description: Shared review contract for post-hoc review and build self-review

lines: Review the current changes for architecture and design quality.
If this review angle is not applicable to the current diff, say so briefly.
Do not edit files or run mutating commands.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
Inspect the actual repository state and changed files directly.
Return only concrete issues with file-specific evidence, prioritizing changes worth fixing before completion.
Review context:
{review_context}
Review the current changes for Ruby/Rails conventions and quality.
If this review angle is not applicable to the current diff, say so briefly.
Do not edit files or run mutating commands.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
Inspect the actual repository state and changed files directly.
Return only concrete issues with file-specific evidence, prioritizing changes worth fixing before completion.
Review context:
{review_context}
Review the current changes for frontend/React/TypeScript quality.
If this review angle is not applicable to the current diff, say so briefly.
Do not edit files or run mutating commands.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
Inspect the actual repository state and changed files directly.
Return only concrete issues with file-specific evidence, prioritizing changes worth fixing before completion.
Review context:
{review_context}
Review the current changes for test quality, coverage, and validation against the stated acceptance criteria.
If this review angle is not applicable to the current diff, say so briefly.
Do not edit files or run mutating commands.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
Inspect changed files and relevant tests directly.
Return missing tests, brittle tests, validation gaps, and the smallest fixes worth doing now.
Review context:
{review_context}
Review the current changes for correctness, regressions, safety, and security.
Do not edit files or run mutating commands.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
Inspect the actual repository state and changed files directly; do not rely on implementation summaries.
Pay special attention to injection risks, auth bypasses, unsafe secret handling, trust-boundary validation failures, and data loss/corruption risks.
Return evidence-backed findings with file paths. Distinguish blockers, fixes worth doing now, and optional/deferred nits.
Review context:
{review_context}
Synthesize all review findings into a single actionable review report.
Do not edit files.
Do not delegate to other subagents; use your available read-only tools directly.
{verdict_instructions}
Deduplicate findings across reviewers. Attribute findings to the relevant reviewer when it adds context, but focus on a coherent unified report.
Review findings:
{context}
